title: Electromagnetic torpedo
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|That, my dear Captain Calrissian, was a demonstration employing one times ten to the minus seventeenth of the power available to me.|[[Rokur Gepta]]|<ref name="Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka">''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''</ref>}}
The '''electromagnetic torpedo''' was a container for [[Rokur Gepta]]'s most powerful weapon.

==Description==
The luminescent pale green substance contained in the torpedo was lethal to all other known forms of life. One cubic millimeter of it could destroy not only all life on a planet but all of the "organic substrate" from which any future life could come. It could thrive even in vacuum.

==History==
After completing his studies, Gepta developed the green fire to wipe out all other life on [[Tund/Legends|Tund]], thus ensuring no other could ever learn the secret to creating it. He then created special force fields that could protect certain areas of the planet from the green flames, but even in these areas it would take billions of years for life to rise again. He used similar force fields on a smaller scale to protect himself when handling it.

During the [[Battle of ThonBoka]], Gepta used a near microscopic electromagnetic torpedo to wipe out a large contingent of the [[Oswaft]] in order to blackmail [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] into agreeing to his request for a duel. Little did Calrissian know that Gepta's flagship, ''[[Wennis]]'', had orders to wipe out all life in the [[ThonBoka]] regardless of who won the duel. However, the ''Wennis'' was destroyed by [[Klyn Shanga]] and his fellow [[Renatasian Confederation|Renatasians]] before it had the opportunity to do so. The only place the deadly substance was known to exist after the battle was the otherwise dead surface of Tund.

==Behind the scenes==
The name of the technique that created the torpedo's payload is unknown, but the substance was called "green flames" or "green death" informally. Only strong electromagnetic shielding was capable of containing it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2007-11-27 -->[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]
